description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image globally and defines a single stage called build_images. Add an images job that runs in the build_images stage, uses the docker:latest image, runs only on the master branch, and uses the docker:dind service. The job executes the exact script steps: apk add --no-cache --update bash; mkdir .docker; echo "{\"experimental\": \"enabled\"}" > .docker/config.json; docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com; docker --config .docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com; ./build_images.sh keepalived alpine 1.3.5; ./build_images.sh syncthing debian 0.14.52; ./build-grafana.sh 5.4.2 latest. No caches or artifacts are defined.
